title: Niche playbook: copy-locks
description: Locked copy strings the build agent renders verbatim across every section of every client's site. Per-niche values written by Module 2D from the niche's top-of-niche analysis (the strongest converting CTAs, form headers, privacy lines observed in the niche's reference pool). Per-client overrides at brand-dna.copy.* take precedence; the playbook is the niche default.

ctaPrimary.description: Primary CTA across every page (hero, mid-page, footer, mobile sticky). Verb-led, niche-specific. Module 2D derives from the highest-converting CTAs observed in the niche's reference pool.

ctaSecondary.description: Secondary CTA. Typically lower-commitment than the primary.

formHeader.description: Pre-form header that sets expectation (response time, no-obligation, etc.). Niche-specific.

formPrivacy.description: Privacy line below the form submit button. Niche-specific reassurance.

mobileCallLabel.description: Label for the mobile sticky call button during business hours. After hours, the mobile sticky shows ctaPrimary instead.

thankYouMessage.description: Optional post-submit message. Niche playbook may include a placeholder for {firstName}.

footerTagline.description: Optional short brand promise rendered in the footer. 4-8 words ideal.

blogIntro.description: Optional blog index intro sentence. Niche-specific framing of why the blog exists.

trustStripClaims.description: Short claim phrases rendered in the niche template's trust signal surface (strip, floating pill, ticker, etc.). Module 2D derives these from the top-of-niche reference pool: pick the strongest differentiation claims that recur across the niche's winning sites. Count comes from trust-signals.json `trustStripCount`.

heroTrustClaims.description: Trust claim rows rendered under the hero H1 (one row per entry, each with a thin-line Heroicon). Module 2D derives these from the top-of-niche pool: surface 4 outcome-led promises the end customer actually responds to in the niche.

riskReversalLine.description: Single sentence rendered below the Process grid to neutralise commitment risk. Module 2D writes a niche-specific version anchored to the end customer's biggest fear (e.g. pricing surprise, pushy sales, contractor abandonment for trades; locked-in rates / hidden fees for hospitality).

heroH1Format.description: Format string describing the H1 pattern, used by Stage 6 copywriting + Stage 10.4b validator. Module 2D derives the structure from the highest-converting hero patterns in the niche's reference pool.

reviewsHeaderFormat.description: Format string for the Reviews section header. May include {N} (total review count) and {platform} placeholders the build agent substitutes from per-client brand-dna.trust.

founderSupportingCards.description: Cards rendered below the Founder photo+text row. Card titles + body templates are derived per niche by Module 2D from the top-of-niche reference pool. Card bodies are filled per-client at Stage 6 copywriting.
